pr.title: fix(dashboard): exclude null values from Select All count in dashboard filters
pr.body:
### SUMMARY

The "Select All" button in dashboard filters incorrectly included null values in its displayed count, even though null values were not actually selected when clicking the button.

**Root cause:** The `bulkSelectCounts` calculation in the `Select` component counted all non-disabled, non-new options as "selectable" — including options with `null` values. However, the `handleSelectAll` function skipped null values when actually performing the selection. This caused a mismatch: "Select All (3)" was shown when only 2 values would actually be selected.

**Changes:**
- Added a `null` check (`option.value == null`) to `bulkSelectCounts` to exclude null-valued options from the selectable count, matching `handleSelectAll` behavior
- Added the same `null` check to `selectAllEligible` for consistent select-all mode tracking
- Changed `handleSelectAll` to use `option.value != null` instead of the truthiness check `option.value &&` to properly support valid falsy values like `0` or `""`
- Added 2 new tests verifying null options are excluded from the Select All count and not selected by Select All

Fixes #3

### BEFORE/AFTER SCREENSHOTS OR ANIMATED GIF

**Before:** "Select All (3)" shown with 2 real values + 1 null value, but only 2 values selected on click.

**After:** "Select All (2)" correctly reflects only the non-null values that will be selected.

### TESTING INSTRUCTIONS

1. Set up a dashboard filter backed by a dataset column that contains NULL values
2. Open the filter dropdown — verify the "Select All (N)" count excludes null values
3. Click "Select All" — verify null values are not selected
4. Verify "Clear (N)" count matches the number of actually selected items

### ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

- [x] Has associated issue: Fixes #3
- [ ] Required feature flags:
- [x] Changes UI
- [ ] Includes DB Migration
- [ ] Introduces new feature or API
- [ ] Removes existing feature or API

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/6ff3d34e87e64f11a37508bb96121176
